hooks.command: input=$(cat); case "$input" in *"git commit"*) if [ "$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" = "main" ]; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Commit auf main ist nicht erlaubt (CLAUDE.md: Feature-Branch + PR). Nutze: git switch -c <branch>"}}'; elif [ -n "$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -E '(^|/)\.env(\.[^/]*)?$' | grep -v '\.env\.example$')" ]; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":".env-/Secret-Dateien sind gestaged. Nicht committen - entfernen mit: git restore --staged <datei>"}}'; fi ;; esac; exit 0

input=$(cat); case "$input" in *"git push"*) [ "$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" = "main" ] && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Push von main ist nicht erlaubt (CLAUDE.md: Feature-Branch + PR)."}}' ;; esac; exit 0
